title: Failure-mode manifest
description: Schema for per-gate failure-mode.yaml files. Slice 6.5 of the production-readiness epic (gibson#176).

gate.description: Name of the gate this failure-mode documents (e.g. 'no_graceful_nil', 'gosec', 'codeql/tenant-id-taint')

symptom.description: The wrong-state signal an agent or operator sees (CI annotation, error message)

fix_command.description: Shell command (or 'edit X then Y') that fixes the failure

verify_command.description: Shell command that confirms the fix landed (typically re-run the gate)

runbook_link.description: Optional URL to a runbook with deeper detail
